channel.title: morningNewsSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from morningNewsSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Inflation tops 4% for first time in 3 years due to gasoline price spike
item.description: Inflation hit its highest level in over three years after the U.S. and Israel launched their war on Iran, driving up gasoline prices.

item.title: July 1 brings major student loan changes. Here's what to know
item.description: A popular repayment plan ends, two new plans begin, and many borrowers will see new loan limits.

item.title: Taiwan conducts drills with US rocket system, firing toward China
item.description: Wednesday's exercise was the first time the US-supplied HIMARS system was used in the Taiwan Strait.

item.title: China refocuses on North Korea ties as nuclear silence shifts balance
item.description: Xi's silence on North Korea's nuclear program came as Kim sought to solidify the country's status as a nuclear power.
